name: Twintek Investment Holdings Limited
summary: Twintek Investment Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the sale of building materials; and provision of construction and engineering services in Hong Kong. The company operates through Sales of Building Materials and Construction Contracts segments. Its products include interior wall-fill materials comprising gypsum block products; timber flooring; roof tiles; and woodwork products. It primarily serves contractors. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Quarry Bay, Hong Kong. Twintek Investment Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Helios Enterprise Holding Limited.
